sections.label: Chorus
lines: Amah in nang a hong gum theilai hi.
Ama khut in gal liahna hi ding hi,

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lungmang mi aw, gal tam hanginah,
Gal nanna le thu-upna liansak ta’n;

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lungmang mi aw, lam haksat ciangin,
deih leh Amah’n nei lai ding,
